cli.no_command: Use nx/nexy --help to see available commands.
cli.tagline: The modern full-stack framework that just works
cli.usage: Run nx or nexy <command> --help for detailed usage

cmd.new: Create a new project in a new directory
cmd.init: Initialize Nexy in the current directory
cmd.dev: Start local development server with hot reload

new.error_letter: Project name must start with a letter.
new.error_chars: Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores.
new.help_arg: Name of the project to create (creates a new directory)
new.help_template: Initialize from a registered template (silent clone).
